task:
Eclipse is open with the workspace at /home/user/workspace.

Configure the Java compiler's Task Tags preferences so that the final tag list is exactly `TODO,FIXME,XXX,HACK` with priorities `NORMAL,HIGH,NORMAL,LOW` (i.e., add a custom 'HACK' tag at Low priority while preserving the default TODO/FIXME/XXX entries and their existing priorities) and case-sensitive task tags are enabled. The change must be persisted to the workspace preferences `org.eclipse.jdt.core.prefs`:

- `org.eclipse.jdt.core.compiler.taskTags=TODO,FIXME,XXX,HACK`
- `org.eclipse.jdt.core.compiler.taskPriorities=NORMAL,HIGH,NORMAL,LOW`
- `org.eclipse.jdt.core.compiler.taskCaseSensitive=enabled`
